User responses may be delayed due to satellite movements.The user CANNOT MAKE OR RECEIVE A VOICE CALL because they are outside cellular coverage.Time of request: 02:32AM UTC. A USER requested emergency services near these coordinates: Latitude 34.2606 (N), Longitude -118.1840 (W).[19:34:20 GMT-07:00 19 Jul 2026] (424) 515-6564: Responders may need to search an area extending at least 10 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user.The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is 943 meters. Responders may need to search 20 meters above and below this level for a 95% chance of finding the user.Enhanced Emergency Data may be available. Their phone number is +14245156564.The user requests help with a SICKNESS OR INJURY emergency.[19:34:20 GMT-07:00 19 Jul 2026] (424) 515-6564: This request is for SOMEONE ELSE.The person in need is BREATHING NORMALLY.The person in need IS SOMEWHAT conscious.The specific emergency is INJURY.The user describes the specific emergency as OTHER, but did not provide further information.The user's iPhone has its region set to UNITED STATES. The user's iPhone has its default language set to ENGLISH.PSAP systems may not render emojis/special characters correctly. Return messages will not be affected.[19:34:20 GMT-07:00 19 Jul 2026] (424) 515-6564: SYSTEM: We received your 9-1-1 text message. You can wait for the next available call taker or you can CALL 9-1-1.[19:34:20 GMT-07:00 19 Jul 2026] (424) 515-6564: Two-way text with the user is now available.[19:34:20 GMT-07:00 19 Jul 2026] (424) 515-6564: This Emergency SOS via satellite session was transferred to the Emergency Relay Center because no PSAP response was received. You may receive or have received a relay voice call for an incident with this same location data. Please verify that your TCC connection and text handling systems are functioning normally, and that dispatchers are logged in to receive texts to avoid relay fallback for future Emergency SOS via satellite sessions.
